plain.en: Father, who filled Saint Onophrius with the fire of your love and gave him the privilege of serving you through a life of contemplation and penance; inspired by his example and helped by his prayer may we learn to love you above all things and devote ourselves to your service. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: Father, who filled Saint Onophrius with the fire of your love
and gave him the privilege of serving you
through a life of contemplation and penance;
inspired by his example and helped by his prayer
may we learn to love you above all things
and devote ourselves to your service.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
